title: cereus meyenii
intro: Cereus meyenii, also known as the Peruvian apple cactus or pitahaya cactus, is a type of cactus native to the Andes mountains. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cereus meyenii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Cereus meyenii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and its edible fruit can be consumed fresh or used as a natural food coloring.
